author: Codex
feature: 初始化双端开发历史与服务器运维 Dashboard
description: 从 iOS/Android Git 历史补齐根目录 HTML 开发历史，新增本机只读 API 通过 SSH 查看阿里云 Docker、数据库表与关键计数；新增服务器部署模式，页面可用小捷管理员账号登录后实时刷新 Docker、数据库结构、功能开关、AI 技能、双端功能对齐表和服务器 Git 状态；HTML 不包含 SSH/数据库/API 密钥；同步修复 iOS ChatViewModelTests 中落后于当前模型签名的测试夹具。
verification: HTMLParser parsed all generated HTML files
node --check passed for embedded dashboard scripts
iOS xcodebuild build for Xjie scheme on iPhone 17 simulator passed
iOS xcodebuild test still fails because existing XjieTests target compiles Omics/Admin app files without their dependent models/services in test scope
Dashboard server mode supports --server-mode --require-auth and validates admin JWT through the running Xjie API
